steps: FIRST turn off activity broadcasts (Settings → Visibility → “Share profile updates with your network”) so the change isn't announced to your contacts.
Edit your profile Name to your current name.
Change your public profile URL — it often still contains the old name: Edit public profile & URL → edit the custom URL.
Update past job titles, your headline, and descriptions that include the former name.
deadnameRemoval.limits: Search engines may cache your old public-profile URL for a while; request a Google refresh after you change it.
deadnameRemoval.escalation: Contact LinkedIn support to clear a cached old profile if it persists.

steps: Set who can see your connections and your profile photo.
Turn off profile discovery via your email or phone number if you prefer.
Review third-party apps with access and revoke unused ones.
